## Professional Summary

Senior Business Analyst and Application Support professional with experience supporting mission-critical financial systems, fixed-income streaming market-data platforms, production operations, cloud modernization initiatives, and REST API-based service architectures. Proven track record partnering with business, operations, infrastructure, DevOps, database, and development teams to support application delivery, production stability, incident investigation, release readiness, disaster recovery testing, and operational resiliency. Experienced with Linux, Oracle, AWS, market-data workflows, data validation, operational runbooks, stakeholder communication, and cross-functional support within highly regulated financial-services environments.

## Work Experience

## Federal Reserve Bank of New York (On-Site via Gresham)

Senior Business Analyst / DevOps Release Coordinator
Apr 2017 – Feb 2026

### Relevant Experience

- Supported a fixed-income streaming market-data platform that normalized, validated, consolidated, and distributed pricing data from multiple vendor feeds to downstream consumers.

- Provided application support and production support for mission-critical Linux/Oracle market-data platforms.

- Supported application modernization and REST API transition initiatives that evolved pricing distribution from Oracle consumer views to service-based API delivery.
- Assisted cloud-migration and API-transition validation by comparing legacy Oracle-based data-access patterns with emerging REST-based service models.
- Supported semiannual disaster-recovery failover and switchover exercises between primary and secondary data centers, validating continuous vendor-feed ingestion, downstream consumer distribution, minimal downtime, and no data loss during planned DR events.
